_meta.description: Cross-domain money extraction patterns for everyday documents with normalization guidance.

rules.name: brl_code_suffix
rules.notes: Brazilian real with ISO code suffix

rules.name: brl_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Brazilian real with R$ prefix, period grouping, comma decimal

rules.name: chf_code_prefix
rules.notes: Swiss franc with apostrophe or comma grouping

rules.name: cny_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Chinese yuan with ¥ prefix (same symbol as JPY, disambiguate by context)

rules.name: commission_percentage_amount
rules.notes: Commission amount from percentage of base

rules.name: currency_after_parenthesis
rules.notes: Parenthesized amount followed by currency code

rules.name: eur_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Euro with € prefix, supports both decimal conventions

rules.name: generic_iso_code_prefix
rules.notes: Generic ISO currency code prefix for less common currencies

rules.name: hkd_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Hong Kong dollar with HK$ prefix

rules.name: inr_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Indian rupee with ₹ prefix, lakh/crore grouping

rules.name: iso_code_with_apostrophe_grouping
rules.notes: ISO code with apostrophe thousand separators

rules.name: jpy_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Japanese yen with ¥ prefix, no decimal places

rules.name: krw_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: Korean won with ₩ prefix, no decimals

rules.name: nzd_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: New Zealand dollar with NZ$ prefix

rules.name: range_generic
rules.notes: Generic currency range with ISO code suffix

rules.name: range_with_to_word_and_code
rules.notes: Numeric range with ISO code suffix

rules.name: sek_suffix
rules.notes: Swedish krona with kr/SEK suffix, space grouping

rules.name: signed_parenthesis_with_code
rules.notes: Signed parenthesis with currency code and optional DR/CR

rules.name: thousands_separator_space
rules.notes: Space as thousands separator (common in French, some European)

rules.name: usd_code_prefix
rules.notes: US dollar with ISO code prefix

rules.name: usd_code_suffix
rules.notes: US dollar with ISO code suffix

rules.name: usd_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: US dollar with $ prefix, optional space, comma grouping

rules.name: written_amount_en_thousands
rules.notes: Written English amounts with currency name

rules.name: written_amount_pt
rules.notes: Written Portuguese amounts with currency name

rules.name: zar_symbol_prefix
rules.notes: South African rand with R prefix
